events.label: Morning transplant medicines
events.instructions: Take Envarsus on an empty stomach. Wait at least 1 hour before breakfast or ActaGain.

events.label: Breakfast medicines
events.instructions: Take with breakfast. Do not take dapagliflozin during significant illness, dehydration, vomiting or poor intake.

events.label: ActaGain morning nutrition
events.instructions: Sip slowly over 45-60 minutes. Do not drink it in one go.

events.label: Midday antibiotic
events.instructions: Disable this reminder when the prescribed antibiotic course is complete.

events.label: Evening medicines
events.instructions: Take the evening mycophenolate about 12 hours after the morning dose.

events.label: ActaGain evening nutrition
events.instructions: Sip slowly over 45-60 minutes after dinner.
